scripts.build:frontend: npm run build:portal && npm run build:preview && npm run build:export
scripts.check:frontend: npm run check:portal && npm run check:preview && npm run check:export
scripts.lint:doc: npm run lint:doc:markdown && npm run lint:doc:html && npm run format:doc
scripts.lint:doc:fix: npm run lint:doc:markdown:fix && npm run lint:doc:html && npm run format:doc:fix
scripts.lint:preview: npm run lint:preview:markdown && npm run lint:doc:html && npm run format:preview
scripts.lint:preview:fix: npm run lint:preview:markdown:fix && npm run lint:doc:html && npm run format:preview:fix
scripts.lint:portal: npm run lint:portal:eslint && npm run lint:portal:biome && npm run format:portal
scripts.lint:portal:fix: npm run lint:portal:eslint:fix && npm run lint:portal:biome:fix && npm run format:portal:fix
scripts.format:portal: prettier --ignore-unknown --check package.json package-lock.json biome.json tsconfig.portal.json tsconfig.preview.json tsconfig.export.json vite.portal.config.ts vite.preview.config.ts vite.export.config.ts eslint.config.mjs .prettierrc.json .prettierignore "internal/portal/portal_ui_src/**/*.{html,ts,tsx}" "internal/portal/portal_ui/*.html" "internal/preview/preview_ui_src/**/*.{html,ts,tsx}" "internal/preview/export_ui_src/**/*.{ts,tsx}"
scripts.format:portal:fix: prettier --ignore-unknown --write package.json package-lock.json biome.json tsconfig.portal.json tsconfig.preview.json tsconfig.export.json vite.portal.config.ts vite.preview.config.ts vite.export.config.ts eslint.config.mjs .prettierrc.json .prettierignore "internal/portal/portal_ui_src/**/*.{html,ts,tsx}" "internal/portal/portal_ui/*.html" "internal/preview/preview_ui_src/**/*.{html,ts,tsx}" "internal/preview/export_ui_src/**/*.{ts,tsx}"
